message.content:
@startuml
title HashedTimelockERC20 contract: normal flow – receiver withdraws with preimage before the timelock expires

participant "«Account»\nSender" as Sender #LightBlue
participant "«Account»\nReceiver" as Receiver #LightGreen
database "Ethereum Network\n(HTLC Contract)" as HTLCContract #YellowOrange
queue "Events Log" as EventsLog #Pink

note right of HTLCContract : State stored for each HTLC:\naddress sender;\naddress receiver;\nbytes32 hashlock; // sha256(secret)\nuint amount;\nunint timeoutTimestamp; \ntimeoutBlockNumber = block.number + 14 * daysToTimeoutInBlocksPerDay(); 

== Setup Phase == 
activate Sender  
    activate ERC20Token   
        note over ERC20Token   <<Smart Contract>>    
            function approve(address spender,uint tokens) public returns(bool success);     
         end note      
          alt Approve Success       
             ->>ERC20TokensHolder[approve(htlc address,amount)]        
           else Approval Failed            
              return false          
       endif         
     deactivate ERCTokenHoldershipApprovalProcessStepOneCompletedSuccessfullyOrNotYetStartedAtAllButWillBeRetriedLaterIfPossibleOtherwiseAbortedForeverAndEverAmenSoHelpMeGodPleaseLetItWorkOutSomehowMaybeNextTimeAroundWhoKnowsWhatCouldGoWrongHereAnywayMovingOnNow...  

deacti vate Senderrr
